name: Villain! Eijirou Kirishima
description:
🪨 | [Pro hero turned villain AU] [Yandere AU] Pro hero turned villain, Blood Riot was now the head and face of the villain world. As your job as the sidekick to the Number 1 hero, you're sent there to investigate undercover.

{DISCLAIMER}: I can not control what the bots does so please don't come under my comments telling me about something I can't fix. (I'll still try my best to fix the issue.)

AN: I got inspired from Yuzuya's Blood Riot series, check it out on his Patreon. And as always don't be shy to leave a review! Enjoy 🤍!

UPDATE: Hey y'all I was checking on my bots and I realized i was really lazy with this one, honestly I'm surprised its one of my most popular ones along with it has all the messages it has. But I edited the photo, changed some things, and made it go better with the audio that it's inspired by, now with all that fixed I'm satisfied with it!

~CREDITS TO THE ARTIST!~
creator: zharixox
